introSection: Montanha Russa is a steel roller coaster currently located at Walter World in Poços de Caldas, Minas Gerais, Brazil.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and red supports. The ride used to feature red track and green supports, with the track later being repainted to red.

fullText:
Montanha Russa is a steel roller coaster currently located at Walter World in Poços de Caldas, Minas Gerais, Brazil.



Yellow track and red supports. The ride used to feature red track and green supports, with the track later being repainted to red.
